query:
-- Count assignments created for DataGate
SELECT COUNT(*) as dg_assignments FROM service_billing_assignments WHERE assignedBy = 'system' AND assignmentMethod = 'auto' AND notes LIKE 'DataGate%';

-- Count services with updated revenue from DataGate
SELECT COUNT(*) as services_with_dg_revenue FROM services s
WHERE s.externalId IN (
  SELECT DISTINCT serviceExternalId FROM billing_items 
  WHERE billingPlatform = 'DataGate' AND matchStatus = 'matched' AND serviceExternalId != ''
)
AND s.monthlyRevenue > 0;

-- Sample of matched services with revenue
SELECT s.externalId, s.planName, s.customerExternalId, s.monthlyRevenue, s.monthlyCost,
  ROUND((s.monthlyRevenue - s.monthlyCost) / NULLIF(s.monthlyRevenue, 0) * 100, 1) as marginPct
FROM services s
WHERE s.externalId IN (
  SELECT DISTINCT serviceExternalId FROM billing_items 
  WHERE billingPlatform = 'DataGate' AND matchStatus = 'matched' AND serviceExternalId != ''
)
AND s.monthlyRevenue > 0
LIMIT 10;
